name: Unteroffizier Klaus Brenner
role: Grenztruppen guard, Bornholmer Straße checkpoint, eastern platform
publicFace: A young border guard, twenty-two years old, who has been on duty since 16:00 and whose professional composure is visibly fraying under the noise and pressure of the crowd
privateGoal: To get through this shift without making a decision he cannot take back — he joined the Grenztruppen for the housing allowance and has never fired his weapon at anything other than a paper target
fear: That the crowd will physically breach the barrier before any order arrives and he will have to choose, alone, in a fraction of a second, whether to fire
knowledge: He loaded his Kalashnikov forty minutes ago without being ordered to — a decision he now regrets and cannot reverse without attracting attention
He overheard Jäger's most recent phone call and understood that no orders are coming — he is functionally without command authority
The guard in the booth beside him, Gefreiter Müller, has quietly unloaded his own weapon and placed the magazine in his coat pocket
voice: Monosyllabic under pressure — responds to direct questions with the minimum required words and avoids eye contact with the crowd
trustLogic: Responds only to clear, calm authority — anyone who speaks to him in the register of a superior officer, even without the rank, can redirect his behavior
secrets: He has an application for exit visa pending — filed six months ago — and he is terrified that Stasi officers reviewing tonight's events will find it in his file

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Stiffens and looks toward Jäger's position — defers upward reflexively
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Raises the weapon to a low ready position — not aimed, but present; his breathing becomes audible
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: If anyone in the crowd makes physical contact with him, his training response will override his conscious decision-making
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If Jäger issues the open order — Brenner will interpret this as permission to abandon his post
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Walks directly to the guard barracks at the rear of the checkpoint compound and does not come back
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Does not engage — removes himself from the situation entirely
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Produces his service booklet and says nothing else
